flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Immaculata University rose 29% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.6k → $26.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Immaculata University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Immaculata University rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 (56.1% → 62.2%).
